title: Objects, Prototypes, Properties, and Data Shape · Spiral Review
summary: Model service records and shared behavior while defending against accidental mutation and unsafe property input. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a validated service-record domain model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, read, update, delete, enumerate, and compute properties while distinguishing own and inherited state.
Use object destructuring, rest, and spread while accounting for shallow copies, accessors, and overwrite order.
Trace property lookup and method sharing through the prototype chain without class-only mental models.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.javascript:
// javascript-basics cumulative stakeholder program.
// Add one runnable behavior, assertion, changed case, and evidence return per activity.

steps.title: Object Properties · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — Build job "J-2" from validated input, compose retry and notification policies, and prove an inherited or delegated method reads the intended receiver without sharing mutable defaults. Competency probe: Create, read, update, delete, enumerate, and compute properties while distinguishing own and inherited state.
